channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government Introduces Measures to Stabilize Prices of Essential Commodities
item.description: The Tanzanian government has unveiled a detailed strategy to manage the rising prices of basic commodities, addressing growing concerns about the increasing cost of living. Authorities plan to monitor...

item.title: Global Ocean Observing System at Risk Amid Growing Climate Demands
item.description: The Global Ocean Observing System (GOOS), a worldwide network of instruments including Argo floats, moored buoys, research vessels, underwater gliders, and sensor-equipped marine animals, provides cri...

item.title: Georgia GOP Senate Campaign Removes Controversial Post Referencing Adviser’s Past Trauma
item.description: The Senate campaign of Republican Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) removed a highly controversial social media post that referenced former NBC anchor Matt Lauer in a way that critics said was insensitive to t...

item.title: Omoyele Sowore Declares Interest to Run for 2027 Presidency Under AAC
item.description: Human rights activist and political figure, Omoyele Sowore, don declare say him wan contest for 2027 presidential election under the African Action Congress (AAC). Sowore yarn this one during an inter...

item.title: How True Leadership Focuses on Service and Empowering People
item.description: Adeola Olaniyi, business development and technology sales professional, don yan say leadership wey dey effective no be about titles, authority or just to dey visible. True leadership na service, emoti...

item.title: Fox News Poll Shows Sharp Decline in Trump's Approval Ratings Amid Economic Concerns
item.description: A recent Fox News poll conducted between May 15-18, 2026, among 1,002 registered voters, reveals troubling approval ratings for President Donald Trump. The survey indicates that his overall approval s...

item.title: Tributes Pour In for Dr Naseem Salahuddin Following Tragic Road Accident in Morocco
item.description: Dr Naseem Salahuddin, a highly respected infectious diseases specialist and professor emeritus at Indus Hospital, tragically passed away in a road accident while visiting Morocco to attend a WHO meeti...

item.title: Government forms panel to address container congestion at major ports
item.description: The Government of India has intervened to address the mounting congestion at the Jawaharlal Nehru Port Authority (JNPA) in Mumbai, which is the busiest container port in the country. A special panel c...

item.title: Simone Signoret: Celebrated Actress and Icon of French Cinema
item.description: Simone Signoret (1921–1985) was one of the most respected and intellectually remarkable actresses in global cinema. She stood out for her dedication to authentic portrayals, often choosing roles that ...

item.title: Ogun State plans stronger laws against vandalism of public infrastructure
item.description: Ogun State Government don announce plans to present new bill for the State House of Assembly wey go make the law strong and put heavier penalties for anybody wey dey vandalise public infrastructure. G...

item.title: Rabbitohs players unite to support teammate Jai Arrow and raise awareness for MND
item.description: South Sydney Rabbitohs captain Cameron Murray has publicly supported a new initiative called 'Try for Jai' aimed at raising awareness for motor neurone disease (MND) following the recent diagnosis of ...

item.title: Eileen Sayles' Life After the Remy Ramsaran Murder Trial
item.description: Eileen Sayles, originally from New Berlin, New York, became widely known following the tragic murder of her best friend, Jennifer Ramsaran, in 2012. Eileen had secretly been involved in an affair with...

item.title: Ladakh Civil Society Groups Reach Preliminary Agreement with Centre on Constitutional Safeguards and Democracy Restoration
item.description: In a significant development for the Union Territory of Ladakh, two major civil society organisations namely the Leh Apex Body (LAB) and Kargil Democratic Alliance (KDA) have announced that they reach...

item.title: Stella Clarifies to Vincent Why She Spoke with Matthew in Episode 48 of The Alibi
item.description: In Episode 48 of the popular Philippine TV series 'The Alibi,' Stella addresses Vincent to clarify the reasons behind her recent conversation with Matthew. The discussion aims to clear any misundersta...

item.title: NCCIA arrests four over illegal sale of government officials’ personal data
item.description: The National Cyber Crime Investigation Agency (NCCIA) on Friday announced the arrest of four individuals linked to an organised network in South Punjab involved in trading sensitive personal data of g...

item.title: International Community Condemns Drone Strikes Targeting Civilians in DR Congo
item.description: The International Contact Group for the Great Lakes region has strongly condemned drone attacks on civilian populations in the Democratic Republic of Congo, calling it a dangerous escalation in the on...

item.title: Jollibee Faces Financial Challenges Amid MSCI Index Downgrade
item.description: Jollibee Foods Corporation was recently downgraded from the MSCI Philippines Standard Index to the small-cap category, signaling caution for global investors rather than a financial collapse. While th...

item.title: Stephen Hawking's former Cambridge home listed for sale at £2.5 million
item.description: The five-bedroom residence in the Newnham area of Cambridge, once home to the renowned physicist Stephen Hawking, has been put on the market for £2.5 million. Hawking, who passed away in 2018 aged 76,...

item.title: U.S. directs all travelers from Ebola-affected regions to enter through Washington-Dulles Airport
item.description: The U.S. Department of Homeland Security has implemented a new measure requiring all travelers returning from countries affected by Ebola to enter the United States through a single designated airport...

item.title: Introducing XONARA: Insights Into the P-pop Girl Group and Their Debut Track “TABI”
item.description: XONARA, a rising P-pop girl group, recently made their debut with their first single titled “TABI.” The group aims to establish a distinct identity within the Philippine pop music scene. Their name, X...
